title: 11 Herbal Teas For Dermatitis
description: Equisetum arvense teas contains a number of bioactive compounds, including saponins, flavonoids, and polysaccharides. These compounds have anti-inflammatory and soothing properties, which can help to reduce the symptoms of dermatitis. The saponins in the tea are particularly effective at calming irritated skin and reducing redness, while the flavonoids have antioxidant properties that can help to protect the skin from damage.
